title: TradeWasteLicenseApplication
description: An application to BIC for a trade waste license, registration, or exemption — the everyday business transaction. NET-NEW: there is NO public API for applying; today applicants file and track applications only inside the Salesforce Experience Cloud portal (bicportal.nyc.gov) or on paper. This schema serves both the read surface (list/get an applicant's own applications and their decision) and the ApplicationRequest write surface (submit a new application). BIC application decisions that end in denial surface publicly as the 'Denied TW and Wholesale Market Companies' dataset (exsg-kpya).

applicationId.description: Server-assigned application number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

bicNumber.description: Existing BIC account number, for renewals/amendments. Omitted for a brand-new applicant.

applicationStatus.description: Lifecycle status ('APPLICATION STATUS'). Set by BIC, not the applicant.

market.description: For wholesale-market applications, the public wholesale market applied to (e.g. Hunts Point Produce).

accountName.description: Legal name of the applicant business ('ACCOUNT NAME').

renewal.description: Whether this is a renewal of an existing credential.

attestation.description: Applicant attests the information is true and complete.
